title: SEC1: idb_request_result hangs forever on IDB abort
description: wasm/src/storage.rs:36-37: idb_request_result() uses forget() on both on_success and on_error Closures. If an IndexedDB transaction is aborted (e.g. storage quota exceeded, browser shutdown, or a concurrent open_db() call during onupgradeneeded), neither onsuccess nor onerror fires. The oneshot rx.await in idb_request_result() then hangs forever — the load_identity() or save_identity() Promise never resolves or rejects. The JS caller hangs silently. Fix: handle the IDBTransaction abort event and send an Err through the oneshot, or add a timeout via gloo-timers.
